prompt: A narrow, dimly lit corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and broken, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. The walls, once painted a pale gray, are now heavily weathered, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough, textured surface beneath. Along both sides of the passage, rusted metal barriers stand at intervals, their once-bright finish now faded and corroded. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into shadow, illuminated faintly by a single, flickering fluorescent light hanging from the ceiling. An old, abandoned arcade machine stands near the left wall, its screen dark and its buttons worn. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet decay and abandonment, as if the place has been forgotten for a long time. The camera slowly tilts downward, bringing the cracked floor and the weeds into sharper focus, while the distant stairs and the arcade machine recede slightly into the background. As the view lowers, the perspective shifts to a more intimate, ground-level view of the broken tiles and the creeping greenery, emphasizing the quiet intrusion of nature into the man-made space.
